items.title: To be clear, my verdict on the Nuggets trading down is still "incomplete", pending further moves that make it make much more sense.
items.author: Joel Rush
items.body_excerpt:
To be clear, my verdict on the Nuggets trading down is still "incomplete", pending further moves that make it make much more sense.

But those moves will be absolutely necessary, and if they don't flip this into something positive, it's tentatively looking like an F-minus.

But we'll see.

items.title: The Denver #Nuggets have a ton of explaining to do if their ostensibly inexplicable move out of the first round doesn't A) lay the pathway for retaining Peyton Watson, and B) facilitate building a stronger contender around Nikola Jokic.
items.author: Joel Rush
items.body_excerpt:
The Denver #Nuggets have a ton of explaining to do if their ostensibly inexplicable move out of the first round doesn't A) lay the pathway for retaining Peyton Watson, and B) facilitate building a stronger contender around Nikola Jokic.

But at face value, without further moves, it's indefensible.

items.title: Hollander POTD Rodney Rogers. SF/PF from Wake was drafted 9th by DEN in 93. Good combo F who was fast + strong. Never a star but useful. Peaked at 15 ppg in 97-98. Gave Mutombo fits as stretch 5 in 02 playoffs. Retired in 05 at age 33. Sadly died recently. RIP.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Terry Davis. Virginia Union PF was undrafted but made MIA roster in 89-90. Put up 5 ppg, 4 rpg in 2 yrs as backup in MIA. Went to DAL where he started from 91-93 & peaked at 13 ppg, 10 rpg. Reverted to backup from 93-01 w/WAS & DEN. Son Ed was a good pro too.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Terry Davis. Virginia Union PF was undrafted but made MIA roster in 89-90. Put up 5 ppg, 4 rpg in 2 yrs as backup in MIA. Went to DAL where he started from 91-93 & peaked at 13 ppg, 10 rpg. Reverted to backup from 93-01 w/WAS & DEN. Son Ed was a good pro too.

items.title: Hollander POTD Popeye Jones. PF from Murray St was drafted 41st by HOU in 92. Spent 92-93 in Italy then sent to DAL where he put up double-doubles & was fan fave for hustle. Became bench boarder for TOR, BOS, WAS, DEN & GS from 95 thru 04. Has been NBA assisstant coach for years.

items.title: Mike Brown broke into the NBA as a video coordinator for the Denver Nuggets in, I believe, 1992. A scant 34 years later, he wins his first NBA title as a head coach. That man can sing whatever Baha Men song he wants. He earned it.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: Mike Brown broke into the NBA as a video coordinator for the Denver Nuggets in, I believe, 1992. A scant 34 years later, he wins his first NBA title as a head coach. That man can sing whatever Baha Men song he wants. He earned it.

items.title: This is a big offseason for the Nuggets. They're still good, but they've fallen behind the Thunder and Spurs. Getting back is going to mean some guys have to go to keep others around. It's no longer good enough to be really good. They have to be better.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
This is a big offseason for the Nuggets. They're still good, but they've fallen behind the Thunder and Spurs. Getting back is going to mean some guys have to go to keep others around. It's no longer good enough to be really good. They have to be better.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Brian Taylor. Princeton SG went to play w/Dr J Nets in ABA + was ROY & 2x all-star. NJ let him go in 76 + he was good w/KC, DEN, SDC thru 82. Led ABA + NBA in 3%. Retired in 82 due to Achilles tear. Underrated & would've been analytics fave.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Earl Boykins. Tiny Eastern Michigan PG was undrafted but bounced around NBA starting in 99 w/NJ, ORL, CLE & LAC. Finally broke thru as scoring bench PG for GS in 02. Signed w/DEN & he had best yrs (13 ppg). Declined after 07 but hung around til 2012. Fun player.

items.title: Hollander POTD Corey Gaines. Loyola Marymount star PG was drafted 65th by SEA in 88. Spent a decade bouncing between NBA & CBA. Best run was w/DEN & Westhead in 90-91 (8.3 ppg). Played in NBA thru 95 & minors/abroad thru 03. Was an NBA asst coach for years. Now coaches in Japan.

"They could easily just pay him and pay the tax, but we know how the Kroenkes operate" a West scout said.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Raef LaFrentz. Kansas C was drafted 3rd in 98 by DEN. Good shotblocker & hit 3s, peaked at 13.8 ppg as rookie. Not strong & was bullied a bit. Traded to DAL in 02 as C of future but dumped to BOS quickly. Knee injuries slowed him down. Retired in 08 at age-31.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Raef LaFrentz. Kansas C was drafted 3rd in 98 by DEN. Good shotblocker & hit 3s, peaked at 13.8 ppg as rookie. Not strong & was bullied a bit. Traded to DAL in 02 as C of future but dumped to BOS quickly. Knee injuries slowed him down. Retired in 08 at age-31.
